A valid game move: choose positive x < n that does not divide n\nghost predicate ValidMove(n: int, x: int)\n{\n  1 <= x < n && n % x != 0\n}\n\n// Can we reach target from start in at most `steps` valid moves?\nghost predicate Reachable(start: int, target: int, steps: nat)\n  decreases steps\n{\n  start >= 1 && target >= 1 &&\n  (start == target ||\n   (steps > 0 &&\n    exists x | 1 <= x < start :: ValidMove(start, x) && Reachable(start - x, target, steps - 1)))\n}\n\n// result is the minimum positive integer reachable from v via valid game moves\nghost predicate IsMinReachable(v: int, result: int)\n{\n  v >= 1 && result >= 1 &&\n  Reachable(v, result, v) &&\n  forall r :: 1 <= r < result ==> !Reachable(v, r, v)\n}\n\nlemma ReachableStep(start: int, target: int, x: int, steps: nat)\n  requires start >= 1 && target >= 1\n  requires 1 <= x < start\n  requires ValidMove(start, x)\n  requires Reachable(start - x, target, steps)\n  ensures Reachable(start, target, steps + 1)\n{\n  assert ValidMove(start, x) && Reachable(start - x, target, (steps + 1) - 1);\n}\n\nmethod DefiniteGame(v: int) returns (result: int)\n  requires v >= 1\n  ensures IsMinReachable(v, result)\n{\n  if v == 2 {\n    assert Reachable(2, 2, 2);\n    assert !Reachable(2, 1, 2);\n    return 2;\n  } else if v == 1 {\n    assert Reachable(1, 1, 1);\n    return 1;\n  } else {\n    // v >= 3\n    assert v >= 3;\n    assert v == 1 * (v - 1) + 1;\n    assert v % (v - 1) == 1;\n    assert ValidMove(v, v - 1);\n    assert Reachable(1, 1, v - 1);\n    ReachableStep(v, 1, v - 1, v - 1);\n    assert Reachable(v, 1, v);\n    return 1;\n  }\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":1,"cache_creation_input_tokens":7059,"cache_read_input_tokens":18264,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":7059},"output_tokens":18,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"ef3e4237-0fb7-4505-a801-ab2c8b9e81af","uuid":"9fbc6237-fa13-43ab-bda8-0de9fa330e1f"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_017PSj2LsgGNwuPFWzVjNHxp","type":"tool_result","content":"File A valid game move: choose positive x < n that does not divide n\nghost predicate ValidMove(n: int, x: int)\n{\n  1 <= x < n && n % x != 0\n}\n\n// Can we reach target from start in at most `steps` valid moves?\nghost predicate Reachable(start: int, target: int, steps: nat)\n  decreases steps\n{\n  start >= 1 && target >= 1 &&\n  (start == target ||\n   (steps > 0 &&\n    exists x | 1 <= x < start :: ValidMove(start, x) && Reachable(start - x, target, steps - 1)))\n}\n\n// result is the minimum positive integer reachable from v via valid game moves\nghost predicate IsMinReachable(v: int, result: int)\n{\n  v >= 1 && result >= 1 &&\n  Reachable(v, result, v) &&\n  forall r :: 1 <= r < result ==> !Reachable(v, r, v)\n}\n\nlemma ReachableStep(start: int, target: int, x: int, steps: nat)\n  requires start >= 1 && target >= 1\n  requires 1 <= x < start\n  requires ValidMove(start, x)\n  requires Reachable(start - x, target, steps)\n  ensures Reachable(start, target, steps + 1)\n{\n  assert ValidMove(start, x) && Reachable(start - x, target, (steps + 1) - 1);\n}\n\nmethod DefiniteGame(v: int) returns (result: int)\n  requires v >= 1\n  ensures IsMinReachable(v, result)\n{\n  if v == 2 {\n    assert Reachable(2, 2, 2);\n    assert !Reachable(2, 1, 2);\n    return 2;\n  } else if v == 1 {\n    assert Reachable(1, 1, 1);\n    return 1;\n  } else {\n    // v >= 3\n    assert v >= 3;\n    assert v == 1 * (v - 1) + 1;\n    assert v % (v - 1) == 1;\n    assert ValidMove(v, v - 1);\n    assert Reachable(1, 1, v - 1);\n    ReachableStep(v, 1, v - 1, v - 1);\n    assert Reachable(v, 1, v);\n    return 1;\n
